info.title: Company Exam Portal API
info.description: Backend API for Company Exam Portal - Admin and Company Management System

post.description: Company registration with logo upload (requires admin approval)

schema.title: Response Company Register Api Auth Company Register Post

get.description: Get all companies (admin only)

schema.title: Response Get All Companies Api Admin Companies Get

put.description: Assign a plan to a company. For 'custom' plan, drives_limit must be provided.

post.description: Send a custom notification message to a specific company

get.description: Get all sent notifications (admin log). Optionally filter by company.

schema.title: Response Get All Notifications Api Admin Notifications Get

get.description: Get drives (admin view)

schema.title: Response Get All Drives Api Admin Drives Get

put.description: Suspend a drive and delete all student responses. Drive, questions, and students are preserved.

get.description: Get detailed view of a drive including questions and students for admin review
Get all colleges

schema.title: Response Get All Colleges Api Admin Colleges Get

get.description: Get custom colleges that need approval

put.description: Approve custom college and update all references

get.description: Get all student groups

schema.title: Response Get All Student Groups Api Admin Student Groups Get

get.description: Get custom student groups that need approval

put.description: Approve custom student group and update all references

get.description: Get exam status for a drive (Admin view)
Get all drives for the authenticated company or admin viewing a specific company

schema.title: Response Get Company Drives Api Company Drives Get

post.description: Create a new drive with window-based timing system

get.description: Get a specific drive

put.description: Update a drive with window-based timing system
Publish a draft drive — moves it to 'upcoming' so it can be started later

post.description: Duplicate a drive with all its questions and targets

get.description: Get all questions for a drive

schema.title: Response Get Drive Questions Api Company Drives  Drive Id  Questions Get

get.description: Get all students for a drive (accessible by company owner or admin)

schema.title: Response Get Drive Students Api Company Drives  Drive Id  Students Get

get.description: Get all approved colleges for targeting

schema.title: Response Get Approved Colleges Api Company Colleges Get

get.description: Get all approved student groups for targeting

schema.title: Response Get Approved Student Groups Api Company Student Groups Get

get.description: Get company's email template

post.description: Preview email template with sample data
Send login credentials to students via email (only for approved drives)

get.description: Check if drive is ready for emailing students

post.description: Upload questions from CSV file. Expected columns: question, option_a, option_b, option_c, option_d, correct_answer, points
Upload students from CSV file. Expected columns: name, email, roll_number, phone, college, student_group
Start the exam window - allows students to login and begin their individual exam duration
Manually end the exam window - closes login access and auto-submits all active exams

get.description: Get the current exam status for the drive window
Get results for all students in a drive with optional percentage filter
Export drive results as CSV (summary or detailed format)
Get the authenticated company's profile including plan info
Get all notifications for the authenticated company (last 90 days)

schema.title: Response Get Notifications Api Company Notifications Get

post.description: Login student with email and access token

get.description: Validate if student token is still valid
Get drive information including window times and exam duration

post.description: Start the exam - generate randomized question order and check window eligibility

get.description: Get all exam questions in the student's randomized order

post.description:
Called by the frontend when it decides to disqualify a student.
The frontend handles all anti-cheat logic; this endpoint simply
persists the disqualification and auto-submits the exam.

get.description: Get student's exam result

post.description: Company raises a new support ticket to admin

get.description: Company views all of their raised tickets (newest first)

schema.title: Response Get My Tickets Api Company Tickets My Tickets Get

get.description: Company views a specific ticket by ID

Admin views all tickets. Supports optional query filters:
- status_filter: open | in_progress | resolved | closed
- category_filter: billing | drive | technical | general
- priority_filter: low | medium | high | urgent

schema.title: Response Get All Tickets Api Admin Tickets Get

get.description: Admin views details of a specific ticket including company info

put.description:
Admin updates the status of a ticket and optionally adds resolution notes.
Resolution notes are required when setting status to 'resolved' or 'closed'.

get.description: API root endpoint
Health check endpoint for production monitoring

AdminTicketResponse.title: AdminTicketResponse
AdminTicketResponse.description: Extended ticket response for admin - includes company details

CompanyPlanUpdate.title: CompanyPlanUpdate
CompanyPlanUpdate.description: Admin sets the plan for a company

category.title: Category
category.description: One of: billing, drive, technical, general

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: One of: low, medium, high, urgent

status.title: Status
status.description: One of: open, in_progress, resolved, closed

resolution_notes.title: Resolution Notes
resolution_notes.description: Required when status is resolved or closed
